response_definition: Euclidean norm of holdout-symbol displacement from the nearest-grid anchor
error_budget: holdout symbol mismatch plus maximum displacement over alternative frozen additive calibrations
decision_rule: positive separation requires max(response - mismatch - protocol_radius) > 0
claim_firewall: A nonzero derivative is not by itself observable separation.
Grid extrema are not continuum extrema.
Operator quotient margins are not converted into symbol units without a declared Lipschitz bridge.
No P1 phase-law pilot is authorized by a nonpositive net margin.
